description: Contextual modifiers for situational match effects in T20 cricket

leftRightPartnership.description: Active when striker and non-striker have different batting hands
leftRightPartnership.reasoning: Bowler must constantly adjust line between deliveries

newBallBoost.description: Swing boost for pace bowlers across the powerplay, decaying linearly
newBallBoost.reasoning: New ball swings most in over 1 and progressively loses movement through over 6

oldBallPenalty.description: Old-ball swing penalty for pace bowlers in the death overs
oldBallPenalty.reasoning: Old ball loses shape and shine — pace bowlers can't get the same movement

deathOversBatterPower.description: Striker strength bonus in the death overs (batter goes for power hitting)
deathOversBatterPower.reasoning: Death-overs intent — batters back themselves to hit harder as the innings closes

usage.description: These modifiers are auto-applied based on match context, no user input required
usage.application: Check conditions before each ball simulation, apply modifiers if triggered
